ENDESA e-distribución — Expansion Readiness
Grid capacity readiness for 4×150kW EV charger deployment (600kW scenario)

Legend

Sufficient — ≥ 720 kW available
Moderate — 480–719 kW
Congested — < 480 kW

Use the layer control (top-right of map) to filter by grid operator.

Filters & Notes

Covers southern and eastern Spain. Each dot = one ENDESA e-distribución substation node. Toggle operators via the map layer control.
